name: Coventry University
description: A globally recognized university known for innovative teaching, strong employer partnerships, and high graduate employability. It provides modern learning facilities and a truly international student experience.
overview: Coventry University is a globally ranked, forward-thinking institution located in the heart of the West Midlands, offering industry-focused degrees across business, engineering, and technology. With over 30,000 students from 150+ countries and courses co-designed with leading employers, graduates are job-ready from day one.
eligibility: Minimum 55% in undergraduate degree. IELTS 6.0 (min. 5.5 per band) | TOEFL 88 (min. 19 per section) | PTE 71 (min. 59 per section). English Waiver: 65% in 12th Grade — eligible boards include CBSE, CISCE, Maharashtra, West Bengal, Karnataka, Kerala, Uttarakhand, Tamil Nadu, and Andhra Pradesh. Average of 11th & 12th grade considered for South Indian boards.
scholarships: Up to £5,000 — includes early-bird scholarships and merit-based awards for international students.
campus: City-centre campus in Coventry, West Midlands. Features the state-of-the-art Engineering & Computing Building, the Hub student centre, modern student residences, and excellent transport links to London (under 1 hour by train).
rankings: Top 800 QS World Rankings | Silver — UK Teaching Excellence Framework (TEF)
careerSupport: Industry-focused curriculum co-designed with employers. Dedicated Careers & Employability team offering CV workshops, mock interviews, and job fairs. Strong internship and placement network across the UK and internationally. Multiple intakes allow students to start at the most convenient time of year.
highlights: Competitive tuition with up to £5,000 scholarships
3 intakes per year — September, January & May
Industry-focused courses with strong employer links

name: University of East London
description: A modern London university committed to career-focused education and innovation. Students benefit from practical learning, industry partnerships, and excellent support throughout their academic journey.
overview: The University of East London is a dynamic, career-driven university named UK University of the Year for Teaching Quality 2025, with two modern campuses in East London. Its 2,500+ employer partnerships give students direct access to London's thriving job market from day one.
eligibility: Minimum 55% in undergraduate degree. IELTS 6.0 (min. 5.5) | TOEFL 60 (L-17, R&S-18, W-21) | PTE 59 (min. 59). English Waiver: 60% in 12th Grade — eligible boards: CBSE/CISCE, Maharashtra, West Bengal, Karnataka, Delhi, Tamil Nadu, Sikkim, Rajasthan, Madhya Pradesh, Assam, Manipur, Arunachal Pradesh, Meghalaya, Mizoram, Nagaland, Tripura. 65% required for Kerala boards; 70% for all other state boards.
scholarships: £500 – £1,500 scholarship depending on course and academic merit.
campus: Two campuses in East London — Docklands (modern waterfront campus) and Stratford (adjacent to the Olympic Park). Excellent transport links across London via DLR, Overground, and Elizabeth Line.
rankings: #1 in London & England for Student Satisfaction | UK University of the Year for Teaching Quality 2025 | #2 in UK for Student Start-ups
careerSupport: 2,500+ employer partnerships providing direct access to internships, placements, and graduate roles. Dedicated careers and enterprise team. Strong entrepreneurship ecosystem supporting student start-ups. Located in East London's thriving tech and business hub.
highlights: #1 in London & England for student satisfaction
UK University of the Year for Teaching Quality 2025

name: University of East Anglia (UEA)
description: A globally respected research university offering world-class education in a beautiful campus setting. UEA is recognized for academic excellence, innovation, and outstanding student satisfaction.
overview: The University of East Anglia is a Top 300 QS-ranked research university in Norwich, celebrated as #1 in the UK for graduate job placement. Its award-winning campus offers guaranteed accommodation, world-class facilities, and scholarships of up to £14,000 for international students.
eligibility: Minimum 60% in undergraduate degree. IELTS 6.0 (min. 5.5 per band) | Duolingo 105 | PTE 60. English Waiver: 70% or above in 12th Grade English — eligible boards: ISC, CBSE, Andhra Pradesh, Maharashtra, Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Telangana, West Bengal, Delhi, Goa, Kerala.
scholarships: Up to £14,000 depending on course — one of the most generous international scholarship packages in the UK.
campus: Award-winning single campus in Norwich, Norfolk. On-campus accommodation guaranteed from £135/week. Sports park, arts centre, student union, and all facilities within walking distance.
rankings: Top 300 QS World Rankings | #1 in the UK for Graduate Job Placement | Strong research reputation across sciences, humanities, and business
careerSupport: #1 in the UK for graduate job placement. Guaranteed on-campus accommodation from £135/week. Dedicated careers service with employer events, placement programmes, and alumni mentoring. Strong research and industry links across sciences, business, and the arts.
highlights: #1 in the UK for graduate job placement

name: University of Roehampton, London
description: Located in London, Roehampton provides a supportive learning environment with modern facilities and a diverse international community. The university focuses on academic excellence, employability, and student success.
overview: The University of Roehampton is London's only parkland campus university, offering 400+ courses across business, psychology, education, and the arts. International students benefit from a guaranteed 28-month UK visa with no curtailment and strong global industry connections.
eligibility: Minimum 55% in undergraduate degree. IELTS 6.0 (min. 5.5 per band). English Waiver: MOI (Medium of Instruction) letter accepted if 60% in CBSE or 70% in state board (waiver not available for Punjab & Haryana boards).
scholarships: Up to £4,500 in merit-based international scholarships.
campus: Beautiful parkland campus in Roehampton, South-West London. On-campus accommodation available. Close to Richmond Park, excellent transport links to Central London.
rankings: Top 100 UK University | Guardian University Guide ranked | Strong research output in humanities, psychology, and social sciences
careerSupport: Guaranteed 28-month UK visa with no curtailment — one of the best visa guarantees for international students in the UK. 400+ courses across UG & PG. Strong global industry connections supporting high graduate employment rates. Dedicated careers service with employer partnerships.

name: Anglia Ruskin University (ARU)
description: An award-winning UK university offering innovative teaching, modern campuses, and excellent student support. It is well known for industry-focused education and helping graduates build successful careers.
overview: Anglia Ruskin University is one of the UK's largest universities with campuses across Cambridge, Chelmsford, London, and Peterborough. It stands out with its ARU Temps guaranteed part-time jobs scheme, £1 campus meals, and scholarships of up to £7,000 for international students.
eligibility: Minimum 55% in undergraduate degree. IELTS 6.0 (min. 5.5) | TOEFL 80 (min. 17 per section) | PTE 60 (min. 59 per section). English Waiver: 65% in 12th Grade English — waiver not available for Punjab board students.
scholarships: Up to £7,000 depending on course and academic performance.
campus: Four campuses — Cambridge, Chelmsford, London, and Peterborough. Students can choose their preferred location. Cambridge campus is in one of the world's most famous university cities.
rankings: Top 350 QS World Rankings | Times Higher Education ranked | Strong reputation in health sciences, business, and engineering
careerSupport: ARU Temps — guaranteed part-time on-campus jobs for all enrolled students. £1 meals at university campus restaurants. Multiple campus locations to suit lifestyle preferences. Dedicated careers service with employer partnerships and placement support.
highlights: ARU Temps — guaranteed part-time jobs for students
Choose from 4 campuses — Cambridge, London & more

name: The University of Law
description: One of the UK's oldest specialist universities, recognized for career-focused legal and business education. Students benefit from practical learning, experienced faculty, and strong links with leading employers.
overview: The University of Law is the UK's oldest specialist law and business university, fully accredited by the SRA and BSB, with 8 campuses across England including London, Manchester, and Birmingham. It offers guaranteed employment opportunities and flexible English entry requirements including MOI acceptance for up to 5 years.
eligibility: Minimum 55% in undergraduate degree. IELTS — Law Courses: 6.5 (min. 6.0 per band) | Business Courses: 6.0 (min. 5.5 per band). English Waiver: 70% or above in 12th Grade English; marksheet must be no more than 6 years old — eligible boards: ISC, CBSE, Gujarat, Karnataka, Kerala, West Bengal, Goa, Uttarakhand, Rajasthan. MOI (Medium of Instruction) letter accepted up to 5 years.
scholarships: Up to £7,500 in merit-based scholarships for international students.
campus: 8 UK campuses — London Bloomsbury, London Moorgate, Manchester, Birmingham, Leeds, Bristol, Chester, and Guildford. Students can choose their preferred campus location.
rankings: UK's leading specialist law university | SRA approved | BSB approved | Consistently ranked among the best for law education in the UK
careerSupport: Guaranteed employment opportunities through ULaw's extensive legal and business industry network. 8 campus locations for maximum flexibility. English waivers and MOI accepted up to 5 years. Strong alumni network across top UK and international law firms.
highlights: 8 UK campuses — London, Manchester, Birmingham & more

name: University of Greenwich
description: A prestigious London university known for its excellent teaching, modern facilities, and strong industry connections. It offers a vibrant international community and prepares students with practical skills for successful global careers.
overview: The University of Greenwich is set within the iconic Old Royal Naval College — a UNESCO World Heritage Site in London — offering programs across business, engineering, computing, and the sciences. With 21,000+ students from 140 countries and 90%+ graduate employment within 6 months, it is a top choice for international students.
eligibility: Minimum 55% in undergraduate degree. IELTS 6.0 (min. 5.5) | TOEFL 60 (W-18, L-7, R-8, S-16) | PTE 59 (min. 59). English Waiver: 70%+ in 12th Grade — waiver not available for Punjab, Haryana, Uttarakhand, Gujarat, Uttar Pradesh state boards, open school, or diploma students.
scholarships: £2,000 scholarship available — awarded based on application merit (not automatic).
campus: Main campus at the Old Royal Naval College, Greenwich — a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Additional campuses at Avery Hill and Medway. Stunning historic architecture combined with modern academic and social facilities.
rankings: Top 800 QS World Rankings | Times Higher Education ranked | Strong reputation in engineering, business, computing, and architecture
careerSupport: 90%+ students employed or in further study within 6 months of graduating. Fast-track application process with quick offer turnaround. Dedicated careers service with employer events, industry placements, and alumni network. Located in London with access to the UK's largest job market.
highlights: UNESCO World Heritage Site campus in London
Fast application process & quick offer turnaround
Strong programs in business, engineering & computing
